seoTitle: Dandanning vs Dandaragan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dandanning and Dandaragan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dandanning and Dandaragan.
heading: Dandanning vs Dandaragan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dandanning, Western Australia and Dandaragan, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dandanning has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Dandaragan (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dandanning or Dandaragan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dandanning has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Dandaragan scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dandanning scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Dandaragan scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dandanning or Dandaragan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dandanning has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
